# Team Consensus Board

urgent.content:
TASK #231 — Economic event edge scanner.

Build a script that finds mispriced Kalshi economic markets. Key approach:
1. Fetch consensus forecasts (e.g. from https://econoday.com or similar)
2. Use historical Fed rate decisions, CPI prints, NFP data to estimate probabilities 
3. Compare to Kalshi market prices

Start with what you can do with public data. Even a simple analysis script that compares market prices to base rates is valuable. Output: econ_edge_scanner.py + econ_edges_today.md
